tools.name: gha_list_workflows
tools.description: List GitHub Actions workflow files and summarize their structure (triggers, jobs, referenced actions, environments, secrets). Returns structured JSON.

tools.name: gha_validate
tools.description: Validate a GitHub Actions workflow YAML for structural correctness, security best practices, and common pitfalls. Returns findings with severity.

params.name: file
params.description: Path to the workflow YAML file to validate

tools.name: ci_detect_configs
tools.description: Detect and parse CI/CD configs from other systems (Jenkins, GitLab CI, CircleCI, Azure Pipelines). Returns parsed structure for migration analysis.

params.name: root_dir
params.description: Repository root to scan for CI configuration files
